allow: Bash(cd "/c/Users/Gyeonghwan Do/OneDrive/Documents/Choire note reader" && cat node_modules/opensheetmusicdisplay/package.json | grep -E '"\(main|module|types|exports\)"' -A 3)
Bash(cd "/c/Users/Gyeonghwan Do/OneDrive/Documents/Choire note reader" && cat node_modules/next/package.json | grep '"version"')

hooks.command: key=$(pwd | tr -c 'A-Za-z0-9' '_'); counter_file="${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/coderabbit-stop-${key}.count"; count=$(cat "$counter_file" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$count" -ge 3 ]; then rm -f "$counter_file"; exit 0; fi; command -v coderabbit >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; changes=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$changes" ]; then rm -f "$counter_file"; exit 0; fi; output=$(coderabbit review --agent -t uncommitted 2>&1); if echo "$output" | grep -qiE 'critical|warning'; then echo $((count+1)) > "$counter_file"; echo "$output" >&2; exit 2; else rm -f "$counter_file"; exit 0; fi
hooks.statusMessage: Running CodeRabbit review on uncommitted changes...
